confirmationModal.cancelBookingText: Are you sure you want to cancel the booking for {{name}}?
confirmationModal.deletePatientText: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?

bookingForm.title: Book an Appointment
bookingForm.subText:
Please fill in the information below.
All fields are required to complete the booking successfully.
bookingForm.nameRequired: Please enter the patient's full name
bookingForm.nameInvalid: The name must contain 2–4 words, each word at least 3 letters, letters only
bookingForm.nameDoubleSpaces: Please do not use consecutive spaces; a single space between words is sufficient
bookingForm.max50Chars: The name must not exceed 50 characters
bookingForm.phoneRequired: Please enter the patient's phone number
bookingForm.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number for the patient
bookingForm.phonePrefixError: Please enter a valid phone number starting with a correct prefix of Syriatel or MTN
bookingForm.bloodTypeRequired: Please select a blood type for the patient
bookingForm.dateFuture: The booking date must be today or a later date
bookingForm.errorMessage: ❌ Please fill in all required fields and complete the form correctly
bookingForm.successMessage: ✔ Appointment booked successfully! The patient has been added to the incoming list
